'''Resti Kel''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Resti Kel system/Legends|Resti Kel system]] of the [[Juvex sector/Legends|Juvex sector]], in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TEA" />

Resti Kel was an industrial world of [[House Kellermin]]. It was the location of the [[Kellermin Competition]], staged every five years.<ref name="TEA" />

*<!-- 1994-05-XX -->{{JournalCite|2|Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)}} {{1st}}
